title: PBI item store + CLI verbs + generated-index renderer
action: Per CONTEXT D2/D3/D4 and plan.md bu-1. Edit BOTH twins of backlog.mjs/command-registry.mjs/bee.mjs identically (test_lib_mirror parity). Item-store reader: parse docs/backlog/items/P<n>.md frontmatter (id,status,feature,opened,closed?); enum proposed|in-flight|parked|done|declined. Verbs: backlog pbi add (allocates next free integer id from existing item filenames, writes the item file), backlog pbi status --id --to (validated), backlog pbi list [--status] [--json] (frontmatter only), backlog render --write|--check (generated docs/backlog.md, KNOWLEDGE_INDEX_HEADER idiom from knowledge.mjs:1100 — deterministic, done/declined as one-line links, counts block badges can scrape). counts/rank/badges/featureBacklogRank re-derive from items WHEN docs/backlog/items exists, else legacy table parse (host-repo compat). Extend test_backlog_capture.mjs: id allocation (incl. race-adjacent double-add refusing duplicate), enum refusals, list filtering, render determinism + --check drift, legacy fallback. Red-first evidence required. Regen manifest + ledger + impact registry.

truths: pbi add allocates mechanically — duplicate id impossible by construction
render deterministic with generated-file header; --check catches drift
enum covers parked+declined; counts include them
legacy table fallback keeps un-migrated repos working

verify: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_backlog_capture.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/ledger_parity.mjs --check && node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --check
